landing.title: Easy. Quick. Transparent.
landing.description: Manage buildings, common expenses, people and financial records from one secure workspace designed for professional building management.

preview.title: Portfolio overview
preview.subtitle: The information that matters, at a glance

features.title: Everything your building portfolio needs
features.description: MXBLOR brings the essential operational and financial workflows from the original platform into a modern, connected experience.

expenses.title: Common expenses
expenses.description: Organize budgets, expense types and monthly building costs without losing the accounting trail behind each amount.

roles.title: Users and roles
roles.description: Give each team member access to the buildings and actions they need while keeping sensitive operations protected.

reports.title: Financial reporting
reports.description: Prepare clear building and unit information for committees, owners and residents from consistent source data.

audit.title: Record auditing
audit.description: Keep an accountable history of important changes so administrators can understand what changed and when.

capabilities.title: Built for the way you work now
capabilities.description: Use the same dependable workflows at the office or on the move, with a platform designed around multi-tenant building management.

mobile.title: Web and mobile
mobile.description: Work from a large desktop canvas or a native mobile experience without learning a second workflow.

insight.title: Clear portfolio insight
insight.description: See useful totals and move directly into the records behind them instead of navigating through disconnected tools.

languages.title: English and Greek
languages.description: Serve teams and customers in their preferred supported language throughout the shared application.

security.title: Tenant-aware security
security.description: Keep each management portfolio isolated with schema, role and permission controls enforced by the platform.

pricing.title: A setup shaped around your building portfolio
pricing.description: Contact M. Halloumas C.C. Ltd for a demonstration, pricing information and guidance through the onboarding process.

footer.trademark: MXBLOR® is a trademark of M. Halloumas C.C. Ltd.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: A current overview of the records in your selected building-management portfolio.

error.title: Dashboard metrics are unavailable
error.description: We could not load the latest totals. Check your connection and try again.

forbidden.title: Dashboard unavailable
forbidden.description: Your account does not have permission to view these portfolio totals.

buildingUnitBalances.title: Unit balances

reports.title: Report Centre
reports.description: Generate current, bilingual PDF reports directly from the live ledger.

building-shares.title: Building shares
building-shares.description: Monthly Capital, Monthly and Savings charges, arrears or credit, distributions and bank balances.

apartment-shares.title: Apartment shares
apartment-shares.description: The selected unit's persisted monthly charges, contacts, totals and remittance accounts.

building-financial.title: Building financial
building-financial.description: Income, expenditure, unit and supplier balances, analyses and bank reconciliation for a date range.

building-unit-financial.title: Building-unit financial
building-unit-financial.description: A dated unit ledger with Balance B/F, scoped movements, monthly subtotals and running balance.

attendance-sheet.title: Attendance sheet
attendance-sheet.description: Every building unit, its owners and selected distribution percentage with signature fields.
